ClinicalTrials.gov completion watch

Current Phase 3 completions in 2026

This dashboard tracks the 949 current industry-sponsored interventional studies in the exported Phase 3 set whose primary completion date falls in 2026, and overlays a live results-signal check for trials already due by the current cutoff. The month view is built directly from the ClinicalTrials.gov export in phase3_current_industry_contains_phase3.csv.

Scope: current records whose phase list contains PHASE3, with statuses limited to NOT_YET_RECRUITING, RECRUITING, ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION, ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING, SUSPENDED. Source data timestamp: 2026-05-15T09:00:05. Live results check cutoff: 2026-05-17.

252 due trials checked live 5 likely company or wire press releases, 61 media or trade coverage matches, and 697 future-dated trials still marked not yet due.

Month view

Primary completion dates by month

A month-level count of current trials scheduled to hit primary completion in 2026.

Trial list

Search by trial ID, therapy, sponsor, title, month, or press-release signal.

Trial ID Drug / therapy Company sponsor Primary completion date Results signal Month

The month breakdown is based on the exact primary completion date string posted in the export. When ClinicalTrials.gov lists only a year-month value, the dashboard still assigns that record to the stated month. The results overlay is a conservative live screen built from the companion press-release check and should be treated as triage, not final adjudication.
